description_long: This house features a simple, boxy layout with a predominantly white exterior and a flat roof, giving it a modern, minimalist appearance. The structure includes several rectangular windows of varying sizes, some with blue-tinted glass, distributed asymmetrically across the walls. There is a distinct entryway with a set of steps leading up to a recessed door, which is highlighted by a brown accent panel. The interior layout is partially visible, showing partitioned rooms and open spaces, suggesting a single-story floor plan. The house also includes a protruding section, likely serving as an additional room or utility area, and the overall design emphasizes clean lines and functional geometry. The lack of ornate detailing and the use of flat surfaces reinforce its contemporary architectural style.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, white exterior, and asymmetrically placed blue-tinted windows. Features a recessed entryway with steps and a minimalist, boxy design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with steps and a recessed door, flanked by small windows and a clean, white facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated wall with multiple windows and a brown accent panel near the entry, as well as the protruding section on the right.
description_view_2: Rear angled view revealing the protruding room, several windows, and a glimpse into the interior partitioning.
description_view_3: Back view displaying a flat wall with two large blue-tinted windows and minimal exterior detailing.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with steps, minimal overhang, and a brown accent panel
